items.name: Soft Peach Glossy Dewy Blush Glow
items.description: Soft Peach Glossy Dewy Blush Glow adds a fresh, radiant flush with a luminous finish. Featuring soft peach tones paired with a glossy, dewy shine, this blush creates a healthy, hydrated glow that feels natural yet beautifully enhanced.

items.name: Soft Red Glittery Gloss Blush Glow
items.description: Soft Red Glittery Gloss Blush Glow adds a radiant, sparkling flush to your look! Featuring soft red tones with a glossy finish and subtle glitter highlights, this blush creates a glowing, luminous effect that feels fresh, playful, and eye-catching.
